summary: A brief author biography page for Thai Lee on the SHI Resource Hub, detailing her educational background, board memberships, and leadership in growing SHI organically. It includes a short excerpt from a 2020 post expressing corporate support for peaceful protests against inequality and injustice.

principles.statement: Organizations should use their collective voice to support peaceful protests against inequality and human rights violations.
principles.rationale: As a corporate leader, she believes in publicly standing against injustice and inequality alongside her employees.
principles.source_quote: Today the employees of SHI lend our voices in support of the peaceful protestors of the most recent episodes of inequality, injustice, and human rights violations.

signature_quotes.text: Today the employees of SHI lend our voices in support of the peaceful protestors of the most recent episodes of inequality, injustice, and human rights violations.
signature_quotes.context: From a June 2020 post titled 'Facing history with courage.'
